honest_statement: v7.0 designed protocols, not ran experiments. The 149 K gap is unchanged. No Tc improvement occurred during this milestone.

track_b_status.reason: Below invest threshold. Best zero-resist 40 K vs 50 K gate.
track_b_status.why_fixed: v7.0 designed protocols, not ran experiments. Nickelate status can only change when strain-Tc mapping protocol is executed.

outcome_combinations.track_a_description: At least one headline match (Tc >= 131 K at one node, T1+)
outcome_combinations.gap_arithmetic: Depends on best confirmed node. If 151 K: 300 - 151 = 149 K. If 140 K: 300 - 140 = 160 K.
outcome_combinations.gap_guardrail: Even at 151 K, gap is still 149 K. No room-temperature progress.

outcome_combinations.track_a_description: All clean misses (no node passes 131 K, most runs T1)
outcome_combinations.combined_route_decision: Activate pivot trigger. Hg1223 falls back to 134 K. Nickelates increased investment, still secondary.

outcome_combinations.nickelate_promotion_blocked_reason: Invest gate not met (40 K vs 50 K). Promote gate requires 100 K from 2+ groups; best is 40 K from 1 group.
